defaultDescription: A gallery-first White Mountains site for atmospheric ridgelines, waterfalls, forest detail, and alpine light across New Hampshire's high country.
tagline: Fine-art White Mountains photography, built with the NH48 family shell and focused entirely on the gallery experience.
author: Nathan Sobol

hero.title: Photography built for the ridgeline, the weather, and the quiet in between.
hero.description: White Mountains Pictures is the gallery-only sibling to the NH48 ecosystem: a clean, crawlable, Cloudflare-ready home for collections, photo details, and placeholder archives while the full image catalog comes together.

footerNote: White Mountains Pictures keeps the NH48-family rhythm and shell language, but focuses entirely on photography collections, image detail pages, and rich source-visible HTML.
